Vertical Banner Stand - Complete Kit # Vertical Banner Stand with Sign Topper | [★★★★★](#product-rvws) [Leave a Review](#product-rvws) The Vertical Banner Stand includes the hardware, (2) 24" x 72" full color banners, and (2) 24" x 18" sign toppers. It works great for indoor display signage for promotions, events, and tradeshows. The Vertical Banner Stand hardware is very durable, made with a steel base plate that helps support stability. The stand supports two banners and two sign toppers that sits above the 6' banner for ultimate visibility. **\*\* Please note: If you have more than one artwork file for this product, kindly leave a note in the order notes section. A representative will reach out to assist you in submitting the additional artwork. \*\*** ![Vertical Banner Stand](https://lag.azureedge.net/product-images/0db86374-2fc5-426b-893e-620c49338995.jpg) Material Choice: (2) 13 oz Vinyl Banners for Banner Stands w/ Sign Topper (2) 18oz Heavy Duty Vinyl for Banner Stands w/ Sign Topper Product: with Vertical Banner Stand - Hardware Quantity: (Min: 1, Max: 1000) Size (H x W): 72" x 24" 72" x 24" ![Loading product options](/includes/Images/loadingBar.gif) Loading product options... Unit Price for Both: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) * [Create your Product](#cust) * [Product Info](#736705d2-9476-4d12-931f-c62c6785ba79) * [Materials](#f13dfad9-293e-41e1-bd21-7e82fd7c03b6) * [Production Times](#0664bd40-5228-4ac7-95be-4269605af13c) * [Assembly](#1a2e189d-6a9c-479b-a50c-472120a0cfe7) * [Assembly Video](#973c6d38-988d-432a-92b7-2c8fe0fec3fb) ## Pick a Template All Templates Automotive Stands Business Stands Business Stands Celebration Stands Church Stands Education Stands Fitness Stands Holiday Stands Misc. Stands Music Stands Political Stands Real Estate Stands Restaurant Stands Sales Stands Sports Stands Sportsman Stands Trade Show Stands Wedding Stands Template Design Template Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) ![Upload a File](https://lag.azureedge.net/banners-site-layout/ico-04.png) Upload a File Upload a File Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) Professional Designer Let Us Design Unit Price: ![Calculating...](/includes/images/loadingBar.gif) _Click on a template to customize your product_ This steel banner stand is built to last, with a heavy base plate for stability in high-traffic areas. Our stand holds two 2' × 6' banners, and includes the unique feature of holding two 24″ x 18″ stand toppers, to maximize your advertising budget and signage real estate. The stand topper sits above the 6′ banner for ultimate visibility. [Create Your Product](#cust) ### Banner Stand Materials **\*\*\* Orders received after 5pm CST will be processed the following business day. \*\*\*** There are two different materials available for the Vertical Banner Stand banner with an addional Sign Topper availble to add on. Banners are typically cut to the edge - no hemming is available. ### 13 oz Vinyl Banners 13 oz vinyl is our most common banner material. Vinyl banners can be used indoors or outdoors. ### 18 oz Heavy Duty Vinyl Banners Our extra heavy duty matte 18oz vinyl banner material is our toughest material. It has a low luster, blockout coating for extra durability and print quality. ### 4mm Coroplast Sign Toppe
